# generate-structured-image-prompt
Description: Generate a detailed, structured image prompt with various creative sections and negative prompts for image generation.
Source: project
1. Initiate the image prompt generation process.
2. The system will process the input and construct a comprehensive prompt.
3. The output will be formatted into distinct categories, such as meta-details, subject description, facial features, body characteristics, hair style, outfit specifics, pose, lighting conditions, and scene elements.
4. A dedicated section for negative prompts will also be included to guide image generation away from undesired elements.
5. Review the generated prompt for use in image creation tasks.
